title: Saylac Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Saylac, with a Z-Score of +3.29. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Saylac is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.5 GG. 
 The high humidity of 80% and low wind speed of 6.5 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, further emphasizing the intense heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
